instruction: Set the font color of the title in slides 2 to 3 as black and bold the title. Also, delete the personal information (including the icons)in slide 4.

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/21_0.pptx', 'dest': '21_0.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/a53f80cd-4a90-4490-8310-097b011433f6/21_0_Gold.pptx', 'dest': '21_0_Gold.pptx'})) or compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/21_0.pptx', 'dest': '21_0.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/a53f80cd-4a90-4490-8310-097b011433f6/21_0_Gold_all_fonts_3.pptx', 'dest': '21_0_Gold_all_fonts_3.pptx'}))
